results.rendered_html:
śāba(va)ra a. (rī f.) [śaba(va) ra-aṇ]
1 Savage, barbarous.
2 Low, vile, base.
— raḥ
1 An offence, a fault.
2 Sin, wickedness.
3 The tree called Lodhra.
— rī A low form of the Prākṛta dialect (spoken by mountaineers &c.)
Comp.
— bhedākhyaṃ (also bhedākṣaṃ) copper.
